summary: Coordinated batch of EXP-256 c2 H1-H5 holes. H4 (0/69 framing) and H5 (visual order) RESOLVED by EXP-271. H1 (denominator language collision) addressed by EXP-277 P2 (verdict-bar aria-label noun 'claims' → 'catalog entries' to match the visible bar caption from EXP-271). H2 (missing test coverage) partially addressed — EXP-271 added 17 assertions; EXP-277 P3 adds the missing exactly-once assertion plus regression guards for P1/P2. H3 (annular eclipse error) addressed by EXP-277 P1. Recommend patch via EXP-277 then close.
